text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to meet with Mayano Top Gun. As
I reach the classroom...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know better than you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Where'd you come from, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, "what's up?" yourself! What are you
doing, getting popular out of nowhere?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Just a second ago, I was talking about how you're
really good at explaining things 'cause you're an
adult.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then my classmates started saying you're
sooo wonderful because you organize all my
equipment so nicely.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I think you're wonderful all the time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whether we're racing or just hanging out, I'm
always having fun when I'm with you!
choice_data_list: I'm happy you feel that way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
How come everyone else knows cool things about
you that I don't know? I don't like that—not one
bit!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I told them something new! About this and that...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! ☆ They were all so shocked—like, "No
way!"
choice_data_list: Wh-what exactly did you tell them?!
Wh-what exactly did you tell them?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's a secret. ♪ That's your punishment for getting
popular!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was worried that she wasn't satisfied with my
instruction, so I'm glad that's not the case. I'm
definitely curious about what she said though...
